character.definition: (simplified form of 㥮) obstinate; stubborn; opinionated; obstinacy; stubbornness; intransigent, truculent; savage, ferocious; fierce
sound of the falling pieces of rocks
color of the wine, smell of alcohol
(same as 閛) bang of the door; the sound of opening or closing the door
a store, shop; ground allotted to a retainer
fish; still; (Cant.) thoroughly soaked; a deep sleep
a wine vessel; tenth earthly branch; Kangxi radical 164
the active, male principle in Chinese philosophy (yang); light; sun
